customManagers.description: Track Node.js version in any mise.toml (web/, studio/) — captures bare semver; the node-version datasource returns bare numeric so no extractVersion needed. studio/mise.toml uses node="lts" which intentionally won't match.
Track pnpm version in any mise.toml — captures bare semver; the npm datasource returns bare numeric
Track NODE_VERSION in netlify.toml — captures bare semver so it stays in sync with mise.toml and engines.node

packageRules.description: Label every Renovate PR for filtering
Tag major updates for triage (no automerge anywhere; default automerge is false)
Group Eleventy core + plugins (all @11ty/* packages release in lockstep)
Group Sanity core, plugins, client, and ecosystem (studio + web)
Group React (react, react-dom, react-is must move together)
Group Vite, Vitest, and Vite plugins (versions are coupled)
Group ESLint core, configs, and globals (flat-config ecosystem moves together)
Group Prettier and its plugins (plugin versions are tied to Prettier's API)
Group AWS SDK v3 packages (clients + signers must move together)
Group Uppy core + plugins (versions move together)
Cross-file: collapse Node bumps from mise.toml customManager and engines.node into one PR; apply 5-day supply-chain floor (manager-specific dep types bypass the matchDepTypes rules below)

Cross-file: collapse pnpm bumps from mise.toml customManager, packageManager field, and engines.pnpm into one PR; apply 5-day supply-chain floor (manager-specific dep types bypass the matchDepTypes rules below)
5-day minimum age for production dependencies (supply-chain protection)
